confirmation_phrase: 我确认执行高风险操作

prerequisites.requirement: Stage1/MyEdge coupling manifest exists and has 168 rows
prerequisites.blocking_if_failed: Stop before staging or sampling; regenerate/read-only audit the manifest first.

prerequisites.requirement: All 168 Stage1 Final files and GT references are available
prerequisites.blocking_if_failed: Stop before staging; inspect missing paths or duplicate target stems.

prerequisites.requirement: Staging root has not been populated
prerequisites.blocking_if_failed: Stop and inspect whether a prior staging run exists before writing/copying files.

prerequisites.requirement: MSFI P1 config template exists and planned output root is absent
prerequisites.blocking_if_failed: Stop before sampling; do not overwrite a populated MSFI P1 root.

prerequisites.requirement: DiffusionEdge baseline P1 config and frozen checkpoint evidence exist; planned output root is absent
prerequisites.blocking_if_failed: Stop before baseline sampling; verify checkpoint size/hash or document any mismatch.

prerequisites.requirement: P1 intake and report sync are still not-started check artifacts
prerequisites.blocking_if_failed: Stop before writing paper claims; no P1 metric evidence exists yet.

prerequisites.requirement: Stage1-side gate board still marks MyEdge P1 as ready only after explicit approval
prerequisites.blocking_if_failed: Stop and reconcile Stage1/MyEdge status files before execution.

future_execution_sequence.title: Refresh P1 preflight/config templates and root checks
future_execution_sequence.expected_evidence: Updated config/preflight files and confirmed staging/output roots remain absent or empty.
future_execution_sequence.stop_rule: Do not proceed if root checks fail or config changes are unexpected.

future_execution_sequence.title: Populate 168 Stage1 Final inputs under original MyEdge stems
future_execution_sequence.stop_rule: Requires user phrase `我确认执行高风险操作`; stop if staged PNG count is not 168.

future_execution_sequence.title: Run Stage1 Final -> MSFI 50k sampling
future_execution_sequence.command:
$msfiRoot = "D:\Desktop\MyEdgeCodex\output_test\stage1_coupling\msfi_50k\stage1_final_168_p1_20260524"
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "$msfiRoot\logs" | Out-Null
D:/Desktop/DeepLearning/my_env/python.exe sample_cond_ldm.py --cfg configs/stage1_coupling/msfi_stage1_final_168_p1_20260524.yaml 2>&1 |
  Tee-Object -FilePath "$msfiRoot\logs\sample.log"
future_execution_sequence.expected_evidence: MSFI P1 png/mat counts are 168 and logs/sample.log exists.
future_execution_sequence.stop_rule: Requires user phrase `我确认执行高风险操作`; stop if png/mat counts differ from 168.

future_execution_sequence.title: Run Stage1 Final -> DiffusionEdge baseline 50k sampling
future_execution_sequence.command:
$baseRoot = "D:\Desktop\MyEdgeCodex\output_test\stage1_coupling\diffusionedge_baseline_50k\stage1_final_168_p1_20260525"
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "$baseRoot\logs" | Out-Null
D:/Desktop/DeepLearning/my_env/python.exe sample_cond_ldm.py --cfg configs/stage1_coupling/diffusionedge_baseline_stage1_final_168_p1_20260525.yaml 2>&1 |
  Tee-Object -FilePath "$baseRoot\logs\sample.log"
future_execution_sequence.expected_evidence: Baseline P1 png/mat counts are 168 and logs/sample.log exists.
future_execution_sequence.stop_rule: Requires user phrase `我确认执行高风险操作`; stop if checkpoint hash/size differs or png/mat counts differ from 168.

future_execution_sequence.title: Evaluate MSFI P1 with eval.py/show.py
future_execution_sequence.expected_evidence: nms count 168, mat-eval/eval_bdry.txt, nms-eval/eval_bdry.txt, logs/eval.log and logs/show.log.
future_execution_sequence.stop_rule: Requires user phrase `我确认执行高风险操作`; stop if any eval/show artifact is missing.

future_execution_sequence.title: Evaluate DiffusionEdge baseline P1 with eval.py/show.py
future_execution_sequence.expected_evidence: nms count 168, mat-eval/eval_bdry.txt, nms-eval/eval_bdry.txt, logs/eval.log and logs/show.log.
future_execution_sequence.stop_rule: Requires user phrase `我确认执行高风险操作`; stop if any eval/show artifact is missing.

future_execution_sequence.title: Run read-only P1 results intake
future_execution_sequence.expected_evidence: A non-pending P1 intake report with both runs core_complete=true.
future_execution_sequence.stop_rule: Do not update paper claims unless intake confirms complete core outputs.

future_execution_sequence.title: Generate visualization-only report assets after core results are ready
future_execution_sequence.stop_rule: Only run after intake reports core_results_ready_for_report_sync or equivalent complete state.

acceptance_criteria: Staging directory contains exactly 168 PNG files with original MyEdge stems.
Both P1 output roots contain exactly 168 PNG and 168 MAT files.
Both P1 output roots contain exactly 168 NMS PNG files after WSL evaluation.
Both P1 roots contain mat-eval/eval_bdry.txt and nms-eval/eval_bdry.txt.
Both P1 roots contain logs/sample.log, logs/eval.log and logs/show.log.
Read-only intake reports both runs core_complete=true with parsed ODS/OIS/AP and AC where available.
Report sync is run only after core completion and then produces manifest.csv, run_report.md, white/, overlay/ and error_map/.
paper_boundaries: Currently allowed: write that P1 is prepared and ready only after explicit high-risk approval.
Currently forbidden: claim Stage1 Final improves ODS/OIS/AP/AC, false-edge suppression, morphology consistency or downstream edge detection.
After results exist: compare Stage1 Final P1 only against existing raw-input anchors in MyEdge.
If ODS/OIS improve but AP drops, write an operating-point/ranking trade-off, not comprehensive superiority.
If only one detector benefits, write detector-specific or interaction-specific support only.
hard_stops: Do not run S1-S5 without explicit MyEdge high-risk confirmation.
Do not create or populate P1 output roots before confirming they are absent or empty.
If P1 intake is complete_with_report_assets, treat this readiness pack as superseded and use the coupling status snapshot instead.
Do not treat this readiness package as a result artifact.
